private-epic-games.sourceTitle: StockAnalysis Epic Games private valuation context
private-epic-games.notes: Oldest primary value in the private-company set; retained with low confidence until a newer verified mark is found.

private-shein.sourceTitle: Motley Fool Shein pre-IPO valuation context
private-shein.notes: Downgraded from the stale $65B estimate; current IPO context puts valuation pressure near $30B.

private-ssi.notes: Reported $2B raise at a $32B valuation for Ilya Sutskever's SSI.

private-anysphere.notes: Series D ($2.3B raise, November 2025) at a $29.3B post-money valuation.
